titleStmt.title: SII 9.690: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 690. (A.R. No. 728 of 1917.) ON A BOULDER AT THE GATE OF THE VILLAGE, DODDERI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1508, Vyaya, Kārtika, śu. 12, corresponding to A.D. 1586 October 14, Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Veṅkaṭapatidēva-Mahārāya ruling at Penugoṇḍe. It records that the Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Raṅgapa-Nāyaka, son of Harati-Lakshmīpati-Nāyaka, made a gift of the village Doḍḍēri, surnamed Veṅkatēśvarasamudra in Aṟeyakōṭe-sīme, a sub-division of Agaḷi-sīme which had been granted for amaranāyakatana to Tirumaleya-Kṛishṇayya, son of Vēdamārga-pratishṭhāchārya Śiṅgārabhaṭṭara-Veṅgaḍamale-Viṭhayya of Kāśyapa-gōtra, Vaikhānasa-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīveṁkaṭēśāya namaḥ . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1508 neya vyayasaṁvatsarada kārttika śu 12 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
vīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatidēvamahārāyaru penugoṁḍeyalu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi prutvīsāṁmrājyaṁgeyiUttiralu śrīma(ṁ)nmahānāyaṁkācāryya
koṭṭabhāṣege tappuva nāyakara gaṁḍa marehokkare kāva vālmīkigōtrada harati lakṣmīpatināyakara kumāra raṁgapanāyakaru śrīmaddēvadēvōttamarāda śrīveṁkaṭē
śvaradēvadivyaśrīcaraṇāraviṁdasamārādhakarāda vēdamārgapratiṣṭācāryarāda kāśyapagōtrada vaikhānasasūtrada yajuśākhādhyāyigaḷāda tirumala tirusthaḷasthānada saṁ
nidhiya maleya siṁgārabhaṭṭara veṁga(ṁ)ḍamaleviṭhayyanavara komāra tirumaleya kṛṣṇayyanavarige rāyadurgada vēṁṭege saluva naṁma Amaranāyaṁkata
nake saluva Agaḷi sīmevoḷagaṇa Arreyakōṭe sīmeya doḍērige pratināmavādaṁthā śrīveṁkaṭēśvarasamudra yeṁba sarvamānyada Agrahāravanu Uthānadvādasi pu(ṁ)ṇya
kāladali koṭṭa Agrahārada śilāśāsana . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanā Accutaṁ padaṁ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ na bhōjya [na kara(ṁ)grāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā] .
Digital edition of SII 9.690 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
